scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @github-support-chat/server" "npm run dev -w @github-support-chat/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @github-support-chat/shared && npm run build -w @github-support-chat/client && npm run build -w @github-support-chat/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @github-support-chat/server && npm run test -w @github-support-chat/client
